title: sarcochilus graeffei
intro: Sarcochilus graeffei, a species of orchid commonly known as the terrestrial orchid, is a flowering plant native to Australia. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sarcochilus graeffei include its potential to aid in the treatment of various health conditions, such as wound healing and skin infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
